title: デビュー戦の後に・黎明

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond finishes her debut race with an
excellent performance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back in the waiting area, she celebrates her debut
with extraordinary excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to the academy, Satono
Diamond tells me about the Satono family jinx,
which prevents them from winning G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she also declares her intention to break
said jinx.
